summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete. Task explicitly required TDD with bats tests written FIRST—none provided. Missing: test file (*.bats), test fixtures as files, test harness script to run `act` for each test case, `act-result.txt` artifact (explicitly required). Workflow references fixtures but doesn't provide them or integrate with act test runner. Actions unpinned to commit SHAs (major best-practice violation). Script has merit (set -euo pipefail, proper error handling, jq logic) but untestable without harness. Unmaintainable without test coverage.
